name: Holiday Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Fresh pumpkin, peeled, seeded, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Make broth with bouillon.
2. Cut pumpkin into 1-inch cubes and place in broth.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes, then puree in blender.
4. Return puree to heat; add half and half and molasses.
5. Add butter, ginger, and nutmeg; simmer 10 minutes.
6. Add parsley; simmer 10 minutes more.
7. Serve with fresh chopped mint on top.
